Notice And Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-07-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC., DBA GREAT WESTERN COLLECTION BUREAU'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO POST-JUDGMENT DISCOVERY; AND FOR AWARD OF MONETARY SANCTIONS.

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION FILED. DEFENDANT TO PAY PLAINTIFF $640 IN SANCTIONS WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Not reported
